SEARCH
Package eu.algites.lib.common.enums.uiddata

Interface AIiUidEnumDataType<R extends AIiUidEnumDataRecord,O extends AIiUidEnumDataOrigin>

public interface AIiUidEnumDataType<R extends AIiUidEnumDataRecord,O extends AIiUidEnumDataOrigin>

Title: AIiUidEnumDataType

Description: Specifies the type of the enum uiddata to be parsed via the uid

Copyright: Copyright (c) 2026 Artur Linhart, Algites

Company: Algites

Date:
20.01.26 8:36

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default Function<String,O>
    getOriginFinder()
    Gets the origin resolver for this enum uiddata type.
    default Function<String,O>
    getOriginGetter()
    Gets the origin resolver for this enum uiddata type.
    List<AIiUidPartMetadata<O>>
    getSpecificUidPartsMetadata()
    Gets the metadata for the specific UID parts of this enum uiddata type.
    default int
    getUidPartCount()
    Gets the count of UID parts for this enum uiddata type.
    BiFunction<String,List<String>,? extends R>
    getUidRecordFactory()
    Gets the factory for the UID parts record instance.

  • Method Details

    • getUidRecordFactory

      BiFunction<String,List<String>,? extends R> getUidRecordFactory()
      Gets the factory for the UID parts record instance.
      Returns:
      the factory for the UID parts record instance

    • getOriginGetter

      default Function<String,O> getOriginGetter()
      Gets the origin resolver for this enum uiddata type. The resolver throws an exception if the origin is unknown.
      Returns:
      the origin resolver. By default it resolves from AInUidEnumDataOrigin.getByCodeOrThrow(String).

    • getOriginFinder

      default Function<String,O> getOriginFinder()
      Gets the origin resolver for this enum uiddata type. The resolver throws an exception if the origin is unknown.
      Returns:
      the origin resolver. By default it resolves from AInUidEnumDataOrigin.findByCodeOrNull(String).

    • getSpecificUidPartsMetadata

      List<AIiUidPartMetadata<O>> getSpecificUidPartsMetadata()
      Gets the metadata for the specific UID parts of this enum uiddata type.
      Returns:
      the metadata for the specific uid parts

    • getUidPartCount

      default int getUidPartCount()
      Gets the count of UID parts for this enum uiddata type. It is equal to the count of specific parts plus 1 for origin prefix plus 1 for namespace prefix.
      Returns:
      the count
